content.en:
Innate Origin Alliance Headquarters.

Ye Tian came here and met one elder after another.

Elder Su Yuan was also here, but his face was a little pale, and he seemed to be injured a lot.

"Elder Su Yuan, what's wrong with you?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Su Yuan smiled and said, "It's okay, it's just to resurrect my grandson, and he has not recovered yet." "

"Resurrection!"

Ye Tian understood, this backlash was not light, and it would take a long time to hope for recovery, and it was estimated that Elder Su Yuan still used the Primordial Realm Flower he traded to him, so that he could be sure that he would successfully resurrect his grandson.

Therefore, he didn't ask more.

However, Su Yuan, who was healing, was called, it must be a big deal, and even Su Yuan had to get out of the customs.

And Ye Tian also saw Soho, and the other party also came.

There were also many elders, all of whom gathered at the headquarters of the Innate Origin Alliance.

"Elder Su Yuan, what happened?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

However, Elder Su Yuan said, "Ye Tian, you'll know later!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian didn't ask again.

In addition to him, there are only a dozen or so Legendary Dao Realms, all of which are almost invincible existences in the Legendary Dao Realm, and some of them have not even been seen by him, and they have all been in retreat for countless years, and they have all been out of the customs as a result.

Almost all of them arrived, and a patriarch appeared.

"I've seen the First Elder!"

Many elders said respectfully.

Ye Tian also shouted, but in fact, it was the first time he had seen this first elder.

This First Elder is one of the founders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and he is also the oldest Patriarch, and no one knows what level of strength he has reached.

The First Elder was a special life born in the Void Domain, and later came to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to help the Innate Origin Domain Alliance develop.

Therefore, the first patriarch is not dragged down by the race, he is a race alone.

Therefore, the First Elder formulated a series of policies that were more friendly to the weak, otherwise the Innate Origin Alliance would have been controlled by these races a long time ago.

After the first patriarch arrived, he said: "Everyone, things are a little sudden, and some of the patriarchs are even in the midst of very important matters, and they have been called back by me, but this matter is too important, so I called you all here. "

The legends and Dao realms who didn't understand the truth of the matter were still listening, wanting to know what was going on.

The First Elder continued, "Not long ago, the Ancient Abyss Realm appeared. Maybe some of you don't know the Ancient Abyss Realm, so I'll tell you about it. There are many opportunities within the Ancient Abyss Realm, when the Ancient Abyss Realm was born, it cultivated the Tenth Elder, Eleventh Eleventh Elder, Twelfth Eleventh Elder, and Sixteenth Elder for the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and also cultivated many top Elders.

The Ancient Abyss Realm not only contains innate primordial treasures, but also contains many Supreme Dao Rule items, and even the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items. Of course, the most important thing is that there is still a treasure in the Ancient Abyss Realm - the Ancient Abyss Fruit. Now, the Gu Yuan Fruit should have ripened.

Gu Yuanguo has a 10% chance of helping an existence like me continue to break through, and it will also help the first demon venerable of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Ancient Vein to break through, his strength is already above me, if he breaks through, our entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance will be destroyed. "

As soon as they heard this, the faces of all the patriarchs changed drastically.

If the Gu Yuan Fruit was really snatched by the Supreme Dao Void Demon, then the Innate Origin Domain Alliance would be in danger.

"First Elder, are you asking us to snatch the Gu Yuan Fruit?"

One of the patriarchs asked.

The First Elder shook his head, "Naturally not, even if you snatch the Gu Yuan Fruit, the First Demon Venerable will not give me the opportunity to refine, and he will definitely do everything to invade the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and even he will do it himself." Once this happens, the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demons may be severely damaged, leaving only a few Supreme Path Void Demons, but we will perish. "

The other elders did not refute, their Innate Origin Domain Alliance was indeed in a weak position, and they did not dare to really set off such a war of extermination.

"And what does the First Senator mean?" asked another Senator.

"Destroy the Gu Yuan Fruit at all costs!" the First Elder also said with a slight heartbeat.

Who doesn't want to break through?

However, he knew that he didn't have a chance to get the Gu Yuan Fruit, so instead of doing this, it was better to destroy it so that everyone had no hope of breaking through.

"First Elder, it seems that the Elder can't enter the Ancient Abyss Realm, right?"

The Thirteenth Patriarch said.

The First Elder smiled and said: "I naturally know why the Patriarch entered the Ancient Abyss Realm, but at a certain price, I can still deceive the rules of the Ancient Abyss Realm and let the Patriarch enter it, but I can't stay in it for too long, and I will fight with all my strength in a battle, and after a long time, I will still be excluded." "

As he spoke, the First Patriarch took out an item.

"This is the Heavenly Order I refined, and I used countless precious materials, just for this time. However, it can only allow the early cultivation of the mythical level to the Dao Realm to enter, and the middle stage of the mythical level to the Dao Realm cannot use the Heavenly Machine Order to enter. "

The First Elder Road.

The cultivation realm of the patriarchs is called the Mythical Dao Realm, and the elders like Su Yuan are all in the early stage of the Mythical Dao Realm, but it is very difficult to reach the middle stage of the Mythical Dao Realm.

Therefore, many patriarchs are cultivated in this way, and they can enter with the help of the Heavenly Order.

"Guys, I've only refined a total of twenty-six Heavenly Orders, and the twenty-six most powerful of you are the Immortal Dao Realm Elders have entered, this is an order!" the First Elder ordered.

It was a matter of life and death for the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and he did not allow the elders to hide behind his back for his own life at this time.

In that case, he wouldn't mind killing it with his own hands.

"I'll go!"

Soho stood up and said.

Su Yuan wanted to stop it, but he also knew that Su Ho did have the strength, and even if he didn't want to go, he would be chosen.

Subsequently.

All the veterans stood up, and some of the veterans who were unwilling to stand up were also named by the first elders.

And who is strong and who is weak, everyone knows more or less, and it is not possible to hide it.

In a short time, twenty senators were elected.

"The strength of the Patriarch will be suppressed, and the top Legends to the Dao Realm will also have to enter, and a dozen of you have been selected, and you must also enter!" The First Elder stared at Ye Tian and their dozen Legends to the Dao Realm and ordered.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian and others are said to be in the Dao realm.

At this time, Ye Tian said again: "First Elder, I can send six clones in!"

"Permission!"

The first patriarch answered.

For the first elders, Ye Tian and the other legends to the Dao Realm only add a little hope, and it really depends on these elders.
